positive: A stylized, minimalist scene featuring a pair of curious owls perched on a delicate, intertwining branch at twilight. The composition should be central, utilizing a clean silhouette against a gradient background of deep indigo and warm gold. Style should be highly graphic, tattoo-inspired linework mixed with modern botanical illustration. Strong contrast between the solid black silhouettes of the owls and the ethereal, luminous glow of the setting sun and crescent moon visible in the background. Focus on geometric patterns and clean lines. Optimized for textile printing.
